purpose: Abstract base for all FOC implementations. Defines pole-pairs configuration, enable/disable, current tunings, and the Calculate() signature. Changing its API requires updating every FOC implementation and every consumer that injects a FocBase.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'FocBase' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21. Re-verify if the interface is renamed or moved.

purpose: Abstract interface for torque-mode FOC. Defines the SetPoint(Ampere) signature. All torque-mode wirings, state machine, CLI terminal, and simulator depend on this contract.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'FocTorque' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21.

purpose: Abstract interface for speed-mode FOC. Defines the SetPoint(Rpm) signature. All speed-mode wirings, mechanical identification, state machine, CLI terminal, and simulator depend on this contract.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'FocSpeed' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21.

purpose: Abstract interface for position-mode FOC. Defines the SetPoint(Radians) signature. All position-mode wirings, state machine, CLI terminal, and simulator depend on this contract.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'FocPosition' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21.

purpose: Abstract factory defining how all hardware peripherals and platform adapters are created and injected. Every target platform must implement this interface; every application entry point and service depends on it. Changing PlatformFactory requires updates to all three platform implementations (host, ti, st) and all Logic/Main consumers.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'PlatformFactory' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21.

purpose: Template header implementing the formal motor lifecycle state machine (Idle -> Calibrating -> Ready <-> Enabled, Fault). Used by LogicWithOuterLoop and target application entry points. Changes to state definitions, transitions, or template parameters require updates to all wiring code.
importedByNote: importedBy list derived by grep for 'FocStateMachineImpl' across non-build source files on 2026-04-21.
